avoid_for: declaring a winner without eval evidence
agent_prompt_tool_matrix.label: World Model Council Agent

avoid_for: training on private or unlicensed data
agent_prompt_tool_matrix.label: Model Eval and Training Agent

best_practice_routing_order: Select a quality resource for hard or client-facing work.
Use fast or budget resources for sandbox iteration.
Use private resources for sensitive inputs only after privacy review.
Escalate to owner approval before external, paid, credential, customer, or production impact.

rules: Use Gemini Flash-Lite, local/open models, cached results, and batchable summaries for safe sandbox drafts.
Use premium models only for high-impact reasoning, client-facing deliverables, or failed cheap-model evals.
Keep paid calls, always-on loops, and external actions behind owner approval and budget limits.
Track projected usage separately from confirmed spend.

mission: Give Buddy a governed prompt, tool, agent, and model-resource library so every bot can pick the best AI route for each task, explain tradeoffs, and fall back safely.

model_resources.label: OpenAI reasoning and general intelligence - Best Quality
model_resources.tradeoff: Higher cost and latency.
model_resources.use_when: Task is high impact, hard, client-facing, or needs strong reasoning.

model_resources.label: OpenAI reasoning and general intelligence - Fast Iteration
model_resources.tradeoff: May need review by a stronger model.
model_resources.use_when: Task needs quick drafts, tests, routing, or repeated loops.

policy.approval_rule: External sends, paid calls, production deploys, customer data, money movement, likeness cloning, and account changes require owner approval.
policy.cost_rule: Prefer free-tier, local, cached, batch, and smallest-capable models for sandbox work. Escalate to paid or premium models only after cost review and owner approval.
policy.model_id_rule: Provider model IDs, prices, rate limits, and availability change often. Treat every resource as a routing candidate and verify the current provider model ID before production use.
policy.secret_rule: Never store provider API keys, customer secrets, private prompts, raw credentials, or paid content in this catalog.

council_steps: pick budget, fast, quality, and private candidates
ask at least two model families for hard decisions
compare cost, latency, quality, safety, and user value
record winner, runner up, failure mode, and next test
route live-impact work to owner approval
world_ai_model_council.mission: Use 100+ globally sourced model resources as a decision council for every bot while tracking strengths, weaknesses, cost, latency, safety, and task fit.
